_comment: Edit this file when you install the bullet-journal skill. These are the only knobs you need to set. Nothing personal or deployment-specific should live in SKILL.md.

storage.notes: Columns: Date (date), Entry (text), Tags (multi-select). Use the Notion connector to create one row per entry. To use a different backend, change 'type' (e.g. 'file') and 'location' (e.g. an absolute path to a markdown file) and update these notes.
